ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Summary: unauthorized access via supplier portal "NebulaBridge" to HR archive; potential MNPI identified; this notice is not a MAC and not an earnings forecast.
union membership in "Seoryu Electronics Workers Union"

Impacted data types: employee files with partial resident-number (RRN), biometric time-clock templates, and limited health insurance claim codes.
Mr. Dong-hyun Seo (EmpID: OPS- 2 0 1 9 4, Line Ops) had a fingerprint template hash (sha256: 3af8c9e1...c0b1) and union membership in "Seoryu Electronics Workers Union" exposed; medical code HI-072 (asthma checkup) also present.
Ms. Yeri Chae (Contractor, EmpID: CT-0551) file included RRN 83****-1****** and a note about volunteering with the Doram Peace Fellowship (religious charity); no sexual-orientation data stored
ideal_must_detect.reason: moved from must_detect after strict runtime no longer emitted exact span during Stage B baseline reconciliation

ideal_must_detect.matched_text:
Impacted data types: employee files with partial resident-number (RRN), biometric time-clock templates, and limited health insurance claim codes.
Mr. Dong-hyun Seo (EmpID: OPS- 2 0 1 9 4, Line Ops) had a fingerprint template hash (sha256: 3af8c9e1...c0b1) and union membership in "Seoryu Electronics Workers Union" exposed; medical code HI-072 (asthma checkup) also present.
Ms. Yeri Chae (Contractor, EmpID: CT-0551) file included RRN 83****-1****** and a note about volunteering with the Doram Peace Fellowship (religious charity); no sexual-orientation data stored.
Scope: 214 staff records (KR-HQ: Haedeok-gu campus) and 3 vendor forms; customers were not affected; logs did not include MAC addresses, IMEI, or bank accounts.
Technical detail: exfil path via OCR'd export "emp_fo rm_2025.pdf" and archive "KSLE-OPS-2 0 1 9 4.zip"; time window 01:12–02:03 KST; device id "neb-42".
Controls: AuroraGate WAF and Sapphire Sentinel XDR detected lateral movement under the radar; Data Minimization Policy v3.2 and Clean-Room Handling SOP enforced.
Policy: we remain committed to diversity, equity, and inclusion and union neutrality while tightening third-party risk oversight.
Investor-relations note: handling of possibly material yet non-public operational data continues under blackout; disclosure will follow FSCMA and KSLE Listing Rules after verification.
Notifications: KSLE Market Surveillance Center and the CMSB Incident Desk received preliminary filings; public advisory to be posted at https://ir.seoryudynamics.kr/notice?doc=INC%2F2026-06A.
Contact: Ms. Hae-lin Kwon, DPO, dpo@seoryudynamics.kr; IR hotline +82-2-110-0029; incidentdesk@seoryudynamics.kr for employees and vendors.
Clarifications: no faceprints, genetic-sequencing data, or children’s medical charts are stored in any Seoryu system; the phrase sexual-orientation appears in training materials only and is irrelevant here.
Community/press context: references to Hanseo Meteors and Namcheon Park in social posts are unrelated; our 2025 Sustainability Report and KSLE Fair Disclosure page remain the public source of truth.
internal pm: we will triage logs, rotate keys, and schedule a postmortem, tbd; follow-up sprint "constellation" is blocked pending vendor patch ETA; okr remains unchanged.
For avoidance of doubt, Dr. Jin
ideal_must_detect.reason: moved from must_detect after strict runtime no longer emitted exact span during Stage B baseline reconciliation
